title: schradera membranacea subsp. flagellarioides
intro: Schradera membranacea subsp. flagellarioides is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Schradera membranacea subsp. flagellarioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
